text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day as I'm walking along the river, I spot
Tamamo Cross.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's this poster about? "Running School:
Students Wanted."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh? ...Ohhh, one of them super expensive
schools only rich kids can attend.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The world's a tough place, huh? Wish they'd make
room for talented poor folk too...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? Rain?! Can this day get any worse? I gotta
find cover!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I also want to avoid the rain, so I head toward the
riverbank, where I see...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hi Tama. I'm trying to hide from the rain.
What about you?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whaddya think, Oguri?! I'm doing da same thing!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Today's just an absolute disaster. First, I see that
stupid poster, then I get rained on outta nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which... Hey, Oguri. You ever go to
one of those running schools?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Running schools? I'm from the countryside, so we
didn't have any. You?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I... I couldn't. I wanted to train hard and make life
a little more comfortable for me and my family,
but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But why?! Why can't I go here?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I wanna race! I wanna win! I wanna make loads of money!

text_block_list.name: School Receptionist
text_block_list.text:
That may be, but you still have to pay for tuition.
Besides, with your... stature, I'm not so sure you'd
do well on our test...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me?! My... stature? You haven't even seen
me run yet! ...Ugh. Whatever!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I was turned away at the gate. They shot me down
without even giving me a chance.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Come to think of it, it was rainin' that day too...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Must've been rough... Actually, I've been told
something similar too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
People scoffed at me for thinking I could go from
running in the country to central races. They said
I'd never be good enough for the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You too, huh? Sorry you had to go through that.
People just assume things about us, but they
don't get us at all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but you can't change the flaws you're born
with. Someone once told me that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Flaws? ...I dunno if I'd call them that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I mean, they make life a lot harder, that's for sure.
But...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Damn it! Damn it! To hell with schools! Just you
watch!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sure I'm a shrimp, but I got my body from my
mom and dad. And I'm gonna win with it no
matter what!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
After getting rejected, I swore I'd prove 'em
wrong one day. I'd show 'em I could be Naniwa's
top runner.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I've been running toward that dream ever
since.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Not being blessed doesn't mean you're flawed.
Growin' up poor and scrawny made me who I am
today.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Using everything I was born with is what gives me
strength!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Th-the rain...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Looks like it finally let up. Let's go, Oguri. Race
you back to the dorms!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'll tear past anything with these legs of mine!
That's why they call me White Lightning!
